paragraphs: Data Analyst with 4+ years of experience delivering data-driven solutions across financial services and healthcare technology. I work fluently in SQL, Python, Power BI, Tableau, and Advanced Excel to build ETL/ELT pipelines, dashboards, KPI reporting, and business intelligence — transforming complex datasets into actionable insight through data validation, statistical analysis, and reporting automation.

I'm equally at home with Machine Learning, NLP, the OpenAI API, LLM integration, prompt engineering, and Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) to support predictive decision-making and process improvement. A strong collaborator, I partner closely with cross-functional stakeholders to raise data quality, reporting accuracy, and operational efficiency.
